event_details.title: ABOUT US But Not ABOUT US
event_details.description:
Get ₱200 OFF Your Ticket with GCash!
Ticket prices are already discounted—just select GCash at checkout and enjoy instant savings. No promo code needed!

ABOUT US BUT NOT ABOUT US is an intense psychological drama that centers on a fraught conversation between Eric, a literature professor, and his student, Lancelot, meeting months after the suicide of Eric's partner, Marcus. What starts as a casual lunch quickly unravels into a revelation of dark secrets and lies, exposing the complicated history and betrayals among the three men. Through their dialogue, the play explores themes of guilt, ambition, and identity, forcing the audience to piece together the chilling truth behind Marcus's death.

Cast: Romnick Sarmenta, Elijah Canlas, Epy Quizon, Andoy Ranay, Herbie Go, Geraldine Villamil, Jack Denzel Gaza, Noel Rayos and Jao Catarus
Direction: Tuxqs Rutaquio

The performance will run for two (2) hours with a 15-minute intermission.

Strictly for mature audiences only.
event_details.admission_rules:
1) The theater will open 30 minutes before the show.

2) Your E-ticket is valid on your chosen date and time.

3) Present your e-tickets at the ticketing table to claim the physical tickets.

4) Eating, drinking, and smoking are not allowed inside the theater at any time.

5) Please turn off mobile phones and other electronic devices or put them on silent mode while inside the theater as these may interfere with the viewing pleasure of other audience members, and may also distract the performers onstage.

6) Except for cheering and applause, please avoid making unnecessary loud noises when the show starts.

7) Pets are not allowed inside the theater.

8) Taking of photos and recording of the performance are strictly prohibited unless authorized by the management.

9) The production company reserves the right to refuse entry to anyone it deems necessary.

10)Under Ticket2Me’s terms and conditions, all ticket sales are final, non-cancellable, and non-refundable.

11) For questions and assistance, contact ask@ticket2me.net, 0918 8427346 | 09178427346, or through Ticket2Me’s social media pages.

12) Sit back, relax, and enjoy the show!

organiser_details.name: The IdeaFirst Company Inc
organiser_details.about: IdeaFirst Live! is the live performance arm of multi-awarded film studio The IdeaFirst Company. IdeaFirst Live! extends the company’s mission of illuminating stories that would otherwise be kept in the dark.
